sections.instruction: For Questions 1-5, complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS. For Questions 6-8, choose THREE letters A-G. For Questions 9-10, choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Which three places does the tourist decide he’s likely to see?
How will the tourist buy the tickets?
How long before he leaves should he buy his tickets?

sections.instruction: For Questions 11-12, choose the correct letter A, B or C. For Questions 13-14, choose TWO letters A-E. For Questions 15-16, write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND / OR A NUMBER. For Questions 17-20, write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD AND / OR A NUMBER.

questions.content: Each day, pandas need to eat:
If pandas are cared for away from the wild, they can live for approximately:
Select two things that are endangering pandas:
options: E Building of roads and railroads

questions.content: What proportion of the panda population in China is protected by reserves? {{BLANK}}
What did the WWF create which encouraged people to support pandas? {{BLANK}}

Reasons that pandas may not be worth saving:
• They are extremely (17) {{BLANK}} to look after
• They have a diet that is not (18) {{BLANK}}
• They get sick easily and are hard to breed
Reasons that pandas should not be allowed to die out:
• They are in danger because (19) {{BLANK}} are damaging the forests
• We should protect their homes because other animals live there
• The number of pandas in the wild is (20) {{BLANK}} so they will not become extinct

sections.instruction: For Questions 21-22, choose the correct letter A, B or C. For Questions 23-27, choose your answers from the box and write the letters A-G next to questions 23-27. For Questions 28-30, choose your answers from the box and write the letters A-F next to questions 28-30.

questions.content: What is the problem that the students are having with the project?
options: A The readings are too difficult
B The readings are not interesting
C The project is taking too long
B It has been operating for too long
C There aren’t enough music shops
D It needs more innovative marketing
E It will close down in the end
F It has a good long-term future

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content:
Behavior or dolphins
• almost 40 species of dolphin
• found (31) {{BLANK}}
• usually in shallower seas
• carnivores
SOCIALISING
• very sociable and live in pods
• super-pods may have more than (32) {{BLANK}} dolphins
• have strong social bonds
• help other animals – Moko helped a whale and calf escape from (33) {{BLANK}}
• have been known to assist swimmers
CULTURE
• discovered in May 2005 that young bottlenose dolphins learn to (34) {{BLANK}}
• dolphins pass knowledge from mothers to daughters, whereas primates pass to (35) {{BLANK}}
AGGRESSION
• dolphins may be aggressive towards each other
�� Like humans, this is due to disagreements over (36) {{BLANK}} and competition for females
• Infanticide sometimes occurs and the killing of porpoises
FOOD
• dolphins have a variety of feeding methods, some of which are (37) {{BLANK}} to one population
• methods include:
o herding
o corralling
o (38) {{BLANK}} or strand feeding
o whacking fish with their flukes
PLAYING
• have a variety of playful activities
• common behaviour with an object or small animal include:
o carrying it along
o passing it along
o (39) {{BLANK}} away from another dolphin throwing it out the water
• may harass other animals
• playful behaviour may include other (40) {{BLANK}} such as humans
